title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 6.
content:
There was a Young Person of Smyrna,
    Whose Grandmother threatened to burn her;
    But she seized on the Cat,
    And said, "Granny, burn that!
    "You incongruous Old Woman of Smyrna!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 6."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
